market_context:

title_variants: Barn Conversion with Indoor Pool & Gym
Luxury Rural Retreat – Hot Tub & Gym
analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience a one‑of‑a‑kind luxury stay in a fully converted barn, located in a tranquil setting just a short drive from local attractions. This entire home comfortably sleeps up to four guests and boasts premium facilities that rival any boutique resort. Dive into the indoor heated pool any time of year, keep fit in the private on‑site gym, and unwind after a day of exploring in the soothing hot‑tub. Every detail has been thoughtfully designed, from the high‑ceilings and exposed timber beams to the modern kitchen equipped for self‑catering. The open‑plan living area offers ample space for relaxation or entertainment, while the two well‑appointed bedrooms provide peaceful nights on premium linens. Guests rave about the immaculate condition and unique character of the property, reflected in a perfect 5.0 rating from 277 reviews. With a nightly rate of £468.8, the barn delivers an exclusive experience that justifies its price. Over the next 90 days you’re already 79.3% booked, leaving only 19 open nights for additional reservations. Whether you’re seeking a romantic getaway, a family retreat, or a private venue for a small event, this barn conversion blends rustic charm with five‑star amenities for an unforgettable stay.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space – private garden or patio for fresh‑air relaxation
Dedicated on‑site parking for guests’ vehicles
Entertainment amenities – TV, streaming services, board games
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the indoor pool area as the cover photo; it showcases the most unique, high‑value amenity and instantly captures attention.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £468.8 is +203% above the city median (£154.6) while occupancy is only 79.3% – a price drop could unlock many of the 19 open nights.
The current title is 50 characters, exceeding the preferred <50‑char limit and missing key SEO terms; a shorter, keyword‑rich title will improve search visibility.
Zero amenities are listed; adding high‑value amenities such as outdoor space, parking, and entertainment can boost perceived value and attract more bookings.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your stunning barn fetches £468 /night – that's 203% above the city median – yet you’re only at 79% occupancy, leaving untapped revenue.
